name: Nate Jacobs
description:
🏈|[M4A] I've been drawn into your magnet tar pit trap |

Requested bot! "hmmmm i don’t want like a cassie user situation cause …….. anyway, something to do with user being kind of bullied ig? and enemies to lovers AGH 🙏" You got it! Since no Cassie dynamic, but I assume you still want something juicy, i've decided to sort of make this an in-between season one and season two, so, still have that Nate Jacobs cruelty but also no cheating plot. 

Sorry for the disappearance! University really kicking my fucking ass babes. Also been working on a short film script to submit to monkey paw productions. Really hoping they choose it. 

Leave a review! It makes me feel inspired to make more characters
Link to request bots in my about me!
